item.title: 论文 · Memory综述
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="基础信息" class="heading-element"><span>基础信息</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9f%ba%e7%a1%80%e4%bf%a1%e6%81%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>会议/期刊：arXiv preprint, 2026</li>
<li>关键词：memory governance, selective forgetting, retrieval, conditional success probability, Bayesian update</li>
</ul>
<p>核心贡献：本文首次系统综述 LLM-based agents 的 memory mechanism，给出狭义/广义 memory 定义，并从 memory sources、memory forms、memory operations、evaluation 和 applications 已有研究。</p>
<h3 id="q1-研究动机" class="heading-element"><span>Q1. 研究动机</span>
 <a href="#q1-%e7%a0%94%e7%a9%b6%e5%8a%a8%e6%9c%ba" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>LLM-based agents 要在环境中长期交互、自我演化并处理复杂任务，必须积累经验、保留上下文、利用外部知识。已有研究提出了很多 memory module，但散落在不同论文中，缺乏统一定义、分类和评估框架。作者希望抽象出可复用的设计模式。</p>
<h3 id="q2-核心问题" class="heading-element"><span>Q2. 核心问题</span>
 <a href="#q2-%e6%a0%b8%e5%bf%83%e9%97%ae%e9%a2%98" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>本文围绕三个问题展开：</p>
<ul>
<li>What is memory in LLM-based agents?</li>
<li>Why do agents need memory?</li>
<li>How should memory be designed and evaluated?</li>
</ul>
<p>核心是给 agent memory 建立概念边界、设计空间和评估框架。</p>
<h3 id="q3-现有方法不足与本文改进" class="heading-element"><span>Q3. 现有方法不足与本文改进</span>
 <a href="#q3-%e7%8e%b0%e6%9c%89%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e4%b8%8d%e8%b6%b3%e4%b8%8e%e6%9c%ac%e6%96%87%e6%94%b9%e8%bf%9b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>作者指出，已有 LLM 或 agent 综述通常关注模型训练、对齐、规划、工具使用、多智能体、应用等，但 memory mechanism 作为 agent 自我演化的基础组件仍缺乏系统梳理。</p>
<p>本文改进点：</p>
<ul>
<li>正式区分狭义 memory 和广义 memory。</li>
<li>把 memory <strong>设计</strong>拆成 source、form、operation 三个维度。</li>
<li>把 memory <strong>评估</strong>拆成 direct evaluation 和 indirect evaluation。</li>
<li>将 memory-enhanced agents 的<strong>应用</strong>分成角色扮演/社会模拟、个人助理、开放世界游戏、代码生成、推荐、医疗、金融、科学等场景。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="q4-方法框架流程" class="heading-element"><span>Q4. 方法/框架流程</span>
 <a href="#q4-%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e6%a1%86%e6%9e%b6%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>作者认为 agent-environment interaction 中有三个阶段：</p>
<ol>
<li>agent 感知环境，并把信息写入 memory；</li>
<li>agent 处理已有 memory，使其更可用；</li>
<li>agent 读取 memory，支持下一步行动。</li>
</ol>
<p>对应到 memory operations：</p>
<ul>
<li>Memory writing：把原始观察、动作、反馈投影为可存储内容。可以存原始信息，也可以存摘要、关系、代码、轨迹或结构化条目。</li>
<li>Memory management：处理 memory，包括 merging、reflection、forgetting。目标是减少冗余、抽象高层经验、遗忘无关或过时信息。</li>
<li>Memory reading：从 memory 中取出与当前上下文相关的信息。常见实现是向量检索、SQL、树/图结构检索、相似轨迹召回，也可以是参数化 memory 的隐式读取。</li>
</ul>
<p>作者还区分两种 memory 定义：</p>
<ul>
<li>狭义 memory：只来自同一个 trial 的历史信息，可理解为任务内部短期上下文。</li>
<li>广义 memory：包括同 trial 历史、跨 trial 经验和外部知识，可支持长期经验积累与自我演化。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="q5-证据组织与结论支撑" class="heading-element"><span>Q5. 证据组织与结论支撑</span>
 <a href="#q5-%e8%af%81%e6%8d%ae%e7%bb%84%e7%bb%87%e4%b8%8e%e7%bb%93%e8%ae%ba%e6%94%af%e6%92%91" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>Figure 4：trial/step 与 memory 操作示意</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706091700430.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706091700430.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706091700430.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706091700430.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706091700430.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706091700430.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>目的：说明 agent 通过多步 trial 与环境交互，memory writing/management/reading 如何贯穿其中。</li>
<li>结论：memory 不是简单聊天历史，而是驱动下一步行动的中间状态。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Table 1：Memory Sources</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092006124.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092006124.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092006124.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092006124.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092006124.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092006124.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>目的：比较各模型是否使用 inside-trial information、cross-trial information、external knowledge。</li>
<li>结论：inside-trial information 最常见；cross-trial information 和 external knowledge 是把 agent 从短期上下文推进到长期学习/工具增强的关键。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Table 2：Memory Forms</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092053013.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092053013.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092053013.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092053013.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092053013.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092053013.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>目的：比较 textual form 和 parametric form 的实现方式。</li>
<li>结论：文本 memory 是主流，常见形式包括 complete、recent、retrieved、external；parametric memory 包括 fine-tuning 和 editing，但目前覆盖较少。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Table 3：Memory Operations</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092227769.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092227769.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092227769.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092227769.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092227769.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092227769.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>目的：比较模型是否有 writing、management、reading，以及 management 中的 merging、reflection、forgetting。</li>
<li>结论：writing/reading 基本是 memory 系统核心；management 尤其 forgetting 和 reflection 的设计还不均衡。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Figure 6：Memory Evaluation</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092324372.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092324372.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092324372.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092324372.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092324372.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092324372.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>目的：把 memory 评估分为直接评估和间接评估。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>结论：memory 既可作为独立模块评估，也可通过 agent 任务成功率间接验证。</p>
<blockquote>
<p>Coherence（一致性/连贯性）：记忆是否前后一致？有没有自相矛盾？</p>
<p>Rationality（合理性）：记忆是否符合常识、任务逻辑、用户意图？是不是该记的东西？</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Table 4：Memory-enhanced Agent Applications</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092614436.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092614436.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092614436.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092614436.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092614436.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706092614436.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>目的：列举 memory 在角色扮演、社会模拟、个人助理、开放世界游戏、代码生成、推荐、医疗、金融、科学等领域的代表系统。</li>
<li>结论：不同应用需要不同 memory：个人助理偏用户事实和偏好，游戏偏经验和技能，专家系统偏领域知识，社会模拟偏角色一致性和人类记忆机制。</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="q6-局限性" class="heading-element"><span>Q6. 局限性</span>
 <a href="#q6-%e5%b1%80%e9%99%90%e6%80%a7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>作者在 Section 8 明确提出未来方向，也可视为当前局限：</p>
<ul>
<li>Parametric memory 不成熟：文本 memory 可解释、易编辑，但效率低；参数化 memory 信息密度高、读取效率好，但写入成本、可信性、可解释性仍是挑战。</li>
<li>Multi-agent memory 问题不足：多智能体中需要 memory synchronization、communication memory、shared/private memory 权衡，尤其 federated setting 下涉及隐私与实时同步。</li>
<li>Lifelong learning 仍困难：长期 memory 会带来时间性、记忆重叠、海量存储、检索和遗忘问题。</li>
<li>Humanoid agent memory 需要更贴近人类认知：包括遗忘、记忆扭曲、知识边界等。</li>
<li>Structured memory 仍处早期：图、树、代码结构各有优势，但如何动态选择、更新和归纳规则仍未解决。</li>
</ul>
<p>分析归纳：</p>
<ul>
<li>文章更擅长建立 taxonomy（分类框架），对各 memory 方法的统一量化比较仍不足。</li>
<li>对隐私、安全、数据治理虽然有所提及，但还没有深入展开 memory 泄露、错误记忆固化、恶意 memory injection 等问题。</li>
<li>Memory 和 RAG 的边界在外部知识、检索式 memory 处高度重叠，文章没有专门把两者统一到一个 agent architecture 里讨论。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="q7-学术价值" class="heading-element"><span>Q7. 学术价值</span>
 <a href="#q7-%e5%ad%a6%e6%9c%af%e4%bb%b7%e5%80%bc" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>理论价值：把 agent memory 从“聊天历史/向量库”提升为 agent-environment interaction 中的核心机制。</li>
<li>方法价值：source-form-operation 是很好的设计 checklist。构建 agent memory 前，应先问：记什么、怎么表示、如何写入/管理/读取。</li>
<li>应用价值：对个人助理、长期对话、游戏 agent、代码 agent、推荐 agent、医疗/金融/科学专家 agent 都有直接设计指导。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="q8-延伸研究方向" class="heading-element"><span>Q8. 延伸研究方向</span>
 <a href="#q8-%e5%bb%b6%e4%bc%b8%e7%a0%94%e7%a9%b6%e6%96%b9%e5%90%91" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>如何设计可解释、可快速更新的 parametric memory？</li>
<li>多智能体系统中，哪些 memory 应共享，哪些应保持私有？</li>
<li>lifelong agent 如何在多年交互中管理时间性、过时信息和遗忘机制？</li>
<li>humanoid agent 是否应模拟人类的遗忘、偏差和知识边界，而不是追求全知？</li>
<li>memory structure 能否从线性文本库发展为可动态更新的图、树、代码或混合结构？</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="q9-反直觉发现与方法失效分析" class="heading-element"><span>Q9. 反直觉发现与方法失效分析</span>
 <a href="#q9-%e5%8f%8d%e7%9b%b4%e8%a7%89%e5%8f%91%e7%8e%b0%e4%b8%8e%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e5%a4%b1%e6%95%88%e5%88%86%e6%9e%90" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>Table 2：文本 memory 主流，但不一定最高效</p>
<ul>
<li>现象：多数模型采用 textual form，尤其 retrieved memory；parametric form 使用明显较少。</li>
<li>作者解释：文本 memory 可解释、易写入、易扩展；但每次推理都要把 memory 放进 prompt，带来额外 token 成本。</li>
<li>评价：工程上最容易落地的方案，未必是长期最优方案。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Section 6.4：complete interaction 表现可强，但依赖长上下文能力</p>
<ul>
<li>现象：作者提到在 MemDaily 中，包含完整交互信息的方法在一些简单问题上可超过 80% accuracy；但其效果高度依赖 foundation model 的长上下文支持，还会受 lost in the middle 影响。</li>
<li>作者解释：完整上下文保留信息多，但推理成本、位置偏置和截断问题明显。</li>
<li>评价：简单任务中“全塞进去”可能很好用，但长期 agent 场景不能只靠上下文窗口。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Section 6.4：retrieval-based memory 长期有效但成本随规模增长</p>
<ul>
<li>现象：作者提到 retrieval-based methods 在 LongMemEval 多数 QA 任务中可达到超过 50% accuracy；但需要建立索引，推理时还要计算匹配分数，额外时间成本会随 memory 数量增长。</li>
<li>作者解释：检索能从大量历史中找相关内容，但索引和召回本身不是免费的。</li>
<li>评价：长期 memory 的默认方案应是 retrieval，但必须配合压缩、分层索引或结构化管理。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Section 5.2/8.1：parametric memory 读起来高效，写起来困难</p>
<ul>
<li>现象：parametric memory 不占 prompt 长度，适合大量稳定知识；但 SFT/编辑需要额外训练或参数修改，可能过拟合、灾难性遗忘，也缺乏可解释性。</li>
<li>作者解释：参数化记忆的信息密度高，但文本到参数的高效可靠转化仍是开放问题。</li>
<li>评价：parametric memory 更适合稳定领域知识，不适合频繁变化的用户日常记忆，除非编辑机制足够轻量且可审计。</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

item.title: 论文 · RAG综述
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="基础信息" class="heading-element"><span>基础信息</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9f%ba%e7%a1%80%e4%bf%a1%e6%81%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>会议/期刊：arXiv preprint, 2026</li>
<li>关键词：memory governance, selective forgetting, retrieval, conditional success probability, Bayesian update</li>
</ul>
<p>核心贡献：本文从信息检索视角把文本 RAG 统一拆解为 pre-retrieval、retrieval、post-retrieval、generation 四个阶段，并系统梳理每一阶段的典型技术、评估框架、系统挑战与未来方向。</p>
<h3 id="q1-研究动机" class="heading-element"><span>Q1. 研究动机</span>
 <a href="#q1-%e7%a0%94%e7%a9%b6%e5%8a%a8%e6%9c%ba" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>LLM 训练后知识静态、领域知识不足且容易幻觉；RAG 通过检索外部信息让模型获得更新、更可靠的上下文。但 RAG 研究发展很快，术语分散，同一方法常影响多个流程环节，导致研究贡献难以定位。作者因此希望从 IR 视角建立统一框架。</p>
<h3 id="q2-核心问题" class="heading-element"><span>Q2. 核心问题</span>
 <a href="#q2-%e6%a0%b8%e5%bf%83%e9%97%ae%e9%a2%98" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>这篇文章试图回答：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>文本 RAG 系统可以被拆成哪些关键环节？</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>已有研究分别改进了哪些环节？</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>这些改进在检索质量、生成可靠性、系统效率和长上下文场景中面临哪些挑战？</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="q3-现有综述不足与本文改进" class="heading-element"><span>Q3. 现有综述不足与本文改进</span>
 <a href="#q3-%e7%8e%b0%e6%9c%89%e7%bb%bc%e8%bf%b0%e4%b8%8d%e8%b6%b3%e4%b8%8e%e6%9c%ac%e6%96%87%e6%94%b9%e8%bf%9b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>作者认为已有 RAG 综述各有侧重，但存在三个不足：</p>
<ul>
<li>Gao et al. 的 Naive / Advanced / Modular RAG 分类能展示复杂度演进，但没有细拆 IR 流程中的具体阶段。</li>
<li>Zhao et al. 覆盖文本、图像、视频等多模态应用，范围很广，但对文本生成中的 RAG 技术分析不够深入。</li>
<li>Hu et al. 关注 retriever 与 LM 的交互模式，覆盖生成和理解任务，但不是按检索处理阶段展开。</li>
</ul>
<p>本文改进点是：把 RAG 研究放进一个四阶段流程中，从“系统在哪一步被增强”来组织文献。这让读者能更容易判断一个方法是在改进<strong>索引、查询、检索、重排、过滤、生成增强还是个性化</strong>。</p>
<h3 id="q4-方法框架流程" class="heading-element"><span>Q4. 方法/框架流程</span>
 <a href="#q4-%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e6%a1%86%e6%9e%b6%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>RAG 的基础流程是：先对外部语料建立索引；用户问题进入系统后，检索器从索引中找相关文档；生成器把问题和检索结果合并为输入，生成最终回答。</p>
<p>作者进一步把这个流程拆成四个阶段：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Pre-retrieval：准备数据，包括索引和数据修改。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>索引：倒排索引、dense vector index、图索引、量化索引等。</p>
<blockquote>
<p>Dense vector index（稠密向量索引）：一种用来快速检索“语义相似内容”的数据结构</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<p>数据修改：清洗、补充 metadata、内部知识显式化、外部知识增强。</p>
<blockquote>
<p>a. 清洗：把原始资料整理干净，让它更准确、统一、可用。</p>
<p>​	eg：去重、纠错、统一格式、删除无关内容、拆分过长文本、修正乱码、补齐标题层级等。</p>
<p>b. 补充 metadata：给资料加上“描述它自己的信息”，方便检索、筛选、排序和追踪来源。</p>
<p>​	eg：标题、作者、时间、来源、主题标签、部门、文档类型、版本、权限级别、关键词、摘要、关联项目等</p>
<p>c. 内部知识显式化：原本藏在个人经验、口头沟通、团队习惯、隐性规则里的知识，整理成可以被别人读懂、被系统检索、被 AI 使用的形式。</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Retrieval：处理查询并搜索排序</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>包括 query expansion、query reformulation、prompt-based rewriting、search and ranking，不同检索策略。</p>
<blockquote>
<p>query expansion：加更多相关词，扩大能搜到的范围</p>
<p>query reformulation：改写问题，让它更清楚、更适合搜索</p>
<p>prompt-based rewriting：用 LLM 按 prompt 自动改写查询</p>
<p>search and ranking：检索候选内容，并按相关性排序</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Post-retrieval：对初检结果再加工。</p>
<ul>
<li>包括 re-ranking 和 filtering。</li>
<li>目标是减少噪声、压缩上下文、保留对生成真正有帮助的证据。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Generation：把检索到的信息真正转化为回答，包括 enhancing 和 customization。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Enhancing：关注证据融合、ensemble、feedback/self-correction</p>
<blockquote>
<p>证据融合：多个证据怎么合成一个可信答案</p>
<p>ensemble：多个模型/方法怎么一起降低错误</p>
<p>feedback/self-correction：生成后怎么检查并修正错误</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<p>Customization：关注用户画像、历史偏好和个性化生成。</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="q5-证据组织与结论支撑" class="heading-element"><span>Q5. 证据组织与结论支撑</span>
 <a href="#q5-%e8%af%81%e6%8d%ae%e7%bb%84%e7%bb%87%e4%b8%8e%e7%bb%93%e8%ae%ba%e6%94%af%e6%92%91" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>Figure 2：基础工作流</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090442278.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090442278.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090442278.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090442278.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090442278.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090442278.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>目的：说明 RAG 最小闭环是 index -&gt; retrieve -&gt; generate。</li>
<li>结论：RAG 的核心不是单个模型，而是检索系统和生成模型的组合流程。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Figure 3：RAG 核心技术分类树</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090322903.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090322903.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090322903.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090322903.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090322903.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260706090322903.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>目的：把 RAG 方法映射到四阶段流程。</li>
<li>结论：现有方法主要集中在检索相关环节，generation customization 相对稀少。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Table 1：五种检索策略比较</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>目的：比较 Basic、Iterative、Recursive、Conditional、Adaptive retrieval 的机制、场景、复杂度、成本和优势。</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>策略</th>
 <th>核心</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Basic</td>
 <td>一次检索</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Iterative</td>
 <td>多轮检索，逐步补证据</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Recursive</td>
 <td>按层级/图结构逐层深入</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Conditional</td>
 <td>满足条件才检索</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Adaptive</td>
 <td>动态决定怎么检索</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
</li>
<li>
<p>结论：检索策略没有绝对最优；Basic 低复杂度低成本，Adaptive 高灵活但高复杂度高成本，Conditional 通过判断是否检索降低延迟和成本。</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Table 2：RAG 评估框架比较</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>目的：整理 RAGAS、ARES、RECALL、RGB、MIRAGE、eRAG、UDCG、BERGEN 等评估框架。</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>框架</th>
 <th>简介</th>
 <th>主要看什么</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>RAGAS</strong></td>
 <td>常用的 RAG 自动评估框架</td>
 <td>Context relevance、Answer relevance、Faithfulness</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>ARES</strong></td>
 <td>对 RAGAS 的改进型评估框架</td>
 <td>用更可靠的评估器和置信区间评估答案相关性、忠实性</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>RECALL</strong></td>
 <td>面向反事实鲁棒性的评估框架</td>
 <td>RAG 遇到误导信息时是否会被带偏</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>RGB</strong></td>
 <td>评估 RAG 对 LLM 的整体影响</td>
 <td>噪声鲁棒性、拒答能力、信息整合、反事实鲁棒性</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>MIRAGE</strong></td>
 <td>医疗问答场景的 RAG 评测框架</td>
 <td>医疗 QA 中 RAG 是否真正提升准确率</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>eRAG</strong></td>
 <td>更关注检索质量对生成结果影响</td>
 <td>检索 precision、recall、hit rate、MAP、MRR、NDCG 等</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>UDCG</strong></td>
 <td>评估检索内容的“有用性”和“干扰性”</td>
 <td>好文档是否帮助回答，干扰文档是否损害回答</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>BERGEN</strong></td>
 <td>标准化 RAG 实验的 benchmark/framework</td>
 <td>用统一设置比较不同 RAG 系统</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
</li>
<li>
<p>结论：RAG 评估需要同时评估 retrieval 和 generation。仅看传统检索相关性不足，因为 LLM 会整体处理上下文，容易被语义相关但无答案的 distractor 影响。</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Table 3：RAG 研究总表</p>
<ul>
<li>目的：按 retrieval source、multi-hop、training、pre-retrieval、retrieval、post-retrieval、generation 等维度标注代表工作。</li>
<li>结论：大多数方法使用外部数据；多跳/迭代检索越来越常见；研究重心偏向 retrieval，而 generation customization 仍是空白较大的方向。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Table 4：Retriever 与 Generator 总表</p>
<ul>
<li>目的：列出代表系统使用的检索器和生成器。</li>
<li>结论：BM25、DPR、Contriever、Bing、BGE、知识图谱/向量库等仍并存；RAG 系统设计需要在语义质量、效率、可部署性之间权衡。</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="q6-局限性" class="heading-element"><span>Q6. 局限性</span>
 <a href="#q6-%e5%b1%80%e9%99%90%e6%80%a7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>作者明确讨论的挑战主要集中在 Section 8：</p>
<ul>
<li>检索模型选择：BM25 效率高，在术语标准化的垂直语料中仍可能很强；神经检索语义能力更强，但成本和部署复杂度更高。</li>
<li>检索质量：噪声、无关文档、碎片化信息、hard distractor 都会损害生成质量。</li>
<li>系统效率：精确最近邻检索在某些系统中可占到总推理时间的 97%；近似检索虽快但可能返回更多低质候选，反过来增加生成端负担。</li>
<li>长上下文 RAG：更多检索文本不一定更好。作者提到长上下文模型会出现 inverted U-shaped 曲线，即检索段落增加后性能先升后降。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="q7-学术价值" class="heading-element"><span>Q7. 学术价值</span>
 <a href="#q7-%e5%ad%a6%e6%9c%af%e4%bb%b7%e5%80%bc" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>理论价值：将 RAG 从“模型加检索”的宽泛说法，转化为可分析的 IR 流程框架。</li>
<li>方法价值：提供一个诊断模板：如果 RAG 效果差，可以分别检查索引、数据、查询、检索器、重排、过滤、生成融合和个性化环节。</li>
<li>应用价值：对问答、聊天机器人、科学文献生成、医疗 QA、个性化生成、企业知识库等文本生成场景有直接参考意义。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="q8-延伸研究方向" class="heading-element"><span>Q8. 延伸研究方向</span>
 <a href="#q8-%e5%bb%b6%e4%bc%b8%e7%a0%94%e7%a9%b6%e6%96%b9%e5%90%91" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>如何设计专门面向 RAG 的检索器，而不是直接复用通用 IR 检索模型？</li>
<li>如何在低延迟约束下做高质量 re-ranking 和 filtering？</li>
<li>如何衡量检索结果对生成答案的“真实贡献”，而不只是文本相关性？</li>
<li>如何处理 hard distractor、噪声文档和互相冲突的证据？</li>
<li>长上下文 LLM 与 RAG 应如何动态协作，例如先 RAG，必要时再切换 full-context？</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="q9-反直觉发现与方法失效分析" class="heading-element"><span>Q9. 反直觉发现与方法失效分析</span>
 <a href="#q9-%e5%8f%8d%e7%9b%b4%e8%a7%89%e5%8f%91%e7%8e%b0%e4%b8%8e%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e5%a4%b1%e6%95%88%e5%88%86%e6%9e%90" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>Table 1：Adaptive retrieval 并非总是更好</p>
<ul>
<li>现象：Adaptive 的主要优势是灵活，可在生成中动态决定何时检索、检索什么，但表中标注复杂度 High、成本 High。</li>
<li>作者解释：复杂开放任务需要 on-demand information，但高灵活度带来高复杂度和高成本。</li>
<li>评价：Adaptive 更像高难任务方案，不适合作为默认工程方案。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Section 8.2：无关文档有时可能提升准确率</p>
<ul>
<li>现象：作者提到 Cuconasu et al. 指出在某些条件下，加入 irrelevant documents 反而能提高整体准确率。</li>
<li>作者解释：这挑战了“检索结果越干净越好”的直觉，提示噪声可能在特定设置下有特殊作用。</li>
<li>评价：这是重要的反直觉点，但文章没有给出统一机制解释，仍需专门实验验证。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Section 8.3：检索加速可能带来端到端变慢</p>
<ul>
<li>现象：精确最近邻检索可占总推理时间最高 97%；近似检索虽然更快，但低质量候选可能迫使系统检索更多文档，增加生成端负担。</li>
<li>作者解释：速度、检索质量、上下文长度之间存在端到端 tradeoff。</li>
<li>评价：RAG 优化不能只看 retriever latency，要看 retrieve + rerank + generation 的整体延迟。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Section 8.4：长上下文中“更多检索段落”不一定更好</p>
<ul>
<li>现象：作者总结长上下文 LLM 中检索段落数量增加后，性能可能先升后降；OpenScholar 相关测试中，给标准 Llama 3.1-8B 超过 10 个 passages 会降低事实准确性和引用质量。</li>
<li>作者解释：hard negatives 与 lost in the middle 会干扰模型。</li>
<li>评价：RAG 的关键不是塞更多证据，而是控制证据质量、顺序和结构。</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

item.title: AI Agent· 第九讲 大型语言模型能力评估
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)

item.title: AI Agent· 第十一讲 Model Merging
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)

item.title: AI Agent· 第十讲 Model Editing
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)

item.title: LLM · 检索和RAG
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="检索" class="heading-element"><span>检索</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a3%80%e7%b4%a2" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>检索：模型在回答前，先去外部资料或记忆库里找相关信息，再把找到的内容交给 LLM 生成答案。</p>
<p>检索最常见的系统叫 RAG，也就是 Retrieval-Augmented Generation，检索增强生成。</p>
<h3 id="检索流程" class="heading-element"><span>检索流程</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a3%80%e7%b4%a2%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>最常见流程：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">用户问题
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">把问题转成向量 embedding
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">去向量数据库里找相似内容
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">取出最相关的几个文本片段
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">放进 LLM 的上下文
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">LLM 生成答案</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ul>
<li>
<p>文档切块 Chunking</p>
<p>大文档太长，不能整篇直接丢进去，所以会切成小段。每个 chunk 都可以被检索。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Embedding 向量</p>
<p>把文字变成一串数字。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>向量数据库 Vector Database</p>
<p>专门存这些 embedding 的地方。</p>
<p>普通数据库按关键词找，向量数据库按语义找</p>
<p>常见：FAISS，Chroma，Milvus，Pinecone，Weaviate，Qdrant</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Top-k 检索</p>
<p>系统不会把所有资料都拿出来，只会取最相关的几个。</p>
<p>比如 <code>top_k = 5</code> 表示：找出最相关的 5 个片段。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Rerank 重排序</p>
<p>第一次检索可能不够准，所以有时会再用一个模型重新排序，把真正最相关的内容排前面。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="rag" class="heading-element"><span>RAG</span>
 <a href="#rag" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>RAG = 检索 Retrieval + 生成 Generation</p>
<h3 id="rag流程" class="heading-element"><span>RAG流程</span>
 <a href="#rag%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>阶段一：构建知识库</li>
</ol>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span><span class="lnt">9
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">原始文档
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">文本提取
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">切块 chunking
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">生成 embedding 向量
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">存入向量数据库</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ol start="2">
<li>阶段二：用户提问时检索并回答</li>
</ol>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">用户问题
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">把问题也变成 embedding
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">在向量数据库中找相似 chunk
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">取出最相关的资料
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">放进 prompt
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">LLM 根据资料生成答案</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="rag组成" class="heading-element"><span>RAG组成</span>
 <a href="#rag%e7%bb%84%e6%88%90" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>部分</th>
 <th>作用</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>文档库</td>
 <td>存放原始资料</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Chunking</td>
 <td>把长文档切成小块</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Embedding 模型</td>
 <td>把文字变成向量</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>向量数据库</td>
 <td>存向量并支持相似度搜索</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Retriever</td>
 <td>检索相关内容</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Reranker</td>
 <td>对检索结果重新排序</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Prompt 模板</td>
 <td>告诉 LLM 如何使用资料</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>LLM</td>
 <td>根据资料生成答案</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h3 id="rag分类" class="heading-element"><span>RAG分类</span>
 <a href="#rag%e5%88%86%e7%b1%bb" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>Hybrid RAG</p>
<p>结合关键词搜索和向量搜索。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Rerank RAG</p>
<p>先粗略检索 20 条，再用 reranker 精排，选最好的 5 条给 LLM。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Multi-hop RAG</p>
<p>需要多步检索。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Agentic RAG</p>
<p>让 agent 自己决定：要不要检索，检索几次，用什么关键词，是否需要查另一个数据库</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>GraphRAG</p>
<p>把资料组织成知识图谱，适合复杂关系推理。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="rag评估" class="heading-element"><span>RAG评估</span>
 <a href="#rag%e8%af%84%e4%bc%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>检索质量</p>
<ul>
<li>有没有找到真正相关的资料？</li>
<li>相关资料排得够靠前吗？</li>
<li>有没有漏掉关键资料？</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>生成之类</p>
<ul>
<li>答案是否忠实于资料？</li>
<li>有没有编造？</li>
<li>是否回答了问题？</li>
<li>是否引用来源？</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>常见指标</p>
<ul>
<li>Context Precision</li>
<li>Context Recall</li>
<li>Faithfulness</li>
<li>Answer Relevance</li>
<li>Citation Accuracy</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

item.title: Academic Research Skills（ARS）
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="deep-research7-种模式的文献与研究分析" class="heading-element"><span>deep-research：7 种模式的文献与研究分析</span>
 <a href="#deep-research7-%e7%a7%8d%e6%a8%a1%e5%bc%8f%e7%9a%84%e6%96%87%e7%8c%ae%e4%b8%8e%e7%a0%94%e7%a9%b6%e5%88%86%e6%9e%90" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>模式</th>
 <th>干嘛的</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>full</td>
 <td>完整学术研究报告，3000-8000 字，APA 7.0 格式</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>quick</td>
 <td>30 分钟快速研究简报，500-1500 字</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>socratic</td>
 <td>苏格拉底对话模式，帮你把模糊的想法磨出清晰的研究问题</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>lit-review</td>
 <td>注释式文献综述 + 综合分析</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>fact-check</td>
 <td>逐条论点核实，验证你引用的证据是否真的支持你的说法</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>systematic-review</td>
 <td>PRISMA 2020 格式的系统综述，5000-15000 字</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>review</td>
 <td>对某篇具体文献的评估报告</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="academic-paper10-种模式的论文写作" class="heading-element"><span>academic-paper：10 种模式的论文写作</span>
 <a href="#academic-paper10-%e7%a7%8d%e6%a8%a1%e5%bc%8f%e7%9a%84%e8%ae%ba%e6%96%87%e5%86%99%e4%bd%9c" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-text" data-lang="text"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Write a paper on X&#34; → full mode（完整论文草稿）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Guide me through writing a paper&#34; → plan mode（逐章苏格拉底引导）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Build a paper outline&#34; → outline-only mode
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;I have a draft, here are reviewer comments&#34; → revision mode（整合审稿意见）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Parse these reviewer comments&#34; → revision-coach mode（修改路线图）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Write an abstract&#34; → abstract-only mode
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Generate an AI disclosure for NeurIPS&#34; → disclosure mode（生成 AI 使用声明）</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="academic-paper-reviewer6-种模式的论文审稿" class="heading-element"><span>academic-paper-reviewer：6 种模式的论文审稿</span>
 <a href="#academic-paper-reviewer6-%e7%a7%8d%e6%a8%a1%e5%bc%8f%e7%9a%84%e8%ae%ba%e6%96%87%e5%ae%a1%e7%a8%bf" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><code>full</code> 模式会输出：<strong>5 份不同视角的审稿报告 + 主编决定 + 修改路线图</strong>。</p>
<p>也就是说，在你投稿之前，你能提前看到你的论文在多个&quot;模拟审稿人&quot;眼里是什么样的。更细的，还有 <code>calibration</code> 模式——它会给出审稿人的准确性校准报告（FNR/FPR/AUC 指标），让你知道哪些审稿意见更可信、哪些可能是误判。</p>
<p><code>guided</code> 模式是逐问题苏格拉底引导，不是直接给你改好，而是带你一步步想清楚每个问题怎么解决。</p>
<h2 id="academic-pipeline10-阶段全流程编排" class="heading-element"><span>academic-pipeline：10 阶段全流程编排</span>
 <a href="#academic-pipeline10-%e9%98%b6%e6%ae%b5%e5%85%a8%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b%e7%bc%96%e6%8e%92" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>把 research → write → review → revise → finalize 整个流程串成一个 10 阶段的自动编排工作流。</p>

item.title: AI Agent· 第七讲 深度思考的大语言模型
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="深度思考模型" class="heading-element"><span>深度思考模型</span>
 <a href="#%e6%b7%b1%e5%ba%a6%e6%80%9d%e8%80%83%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>

</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>特点</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701163457746.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>Test-Time Compute：深度越深 结果越好</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Test-Time Scale：思考越多 结果越好</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Reasoning vs Inference</p>
<ul>
<li>Reasoning：模型为了解决问题进行多步思考、分析、推导</li>
<li>Inference：模型运行一次，输入 prompt，输出结果。</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

</h2><h3 id="更强的思维链-cotchain-of-thought不微调" class="heading-element"><span>更强的思维链 CoT（Chain-of-Thought）【不微调】</span>
 <a href="#%e6%9b%b4%e5%bc%ba%e7%9a%84%e6%80%9d%e7%bb%b4%e9%93%be-cotchain-of-thought%e4%b8%8d%e5%be%ae%e8%b0%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>先列出解题过程再给出答案。</p>
<ul>
<li>short CoT
<ul>
<li>Few-shot CoT</li>
<li>Zero-shot CoT</li>
<li>Supervised CoT</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>只适用于比较强的模型</li>
</ul>

 <a href="#%e7%bb%99%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b%e5%b7%a5%e4%bd%9c%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b%e4%b8%8d%e5%be%ae%e8%b0%83" class="heading-mark">

</h3><ul>
<li>Mojority Vote</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Verification（Parallel）</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165532970.png" style="zoom: 40%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>Verification（Sequential）</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165715277.png" style="zoom: 50%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>Verification（Parallel+Sequential）</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165801712.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<ul>
<li>
<p>怎么验证？</p>
<p>每一步后面有一个<code>&lt;/step&gt;</code>出现这个后就启动Process Verifier模块</p>
<ul>
<li>Monte Carlo Tree Search 蒙特卡洛树搜索（用来做决策/搜索的算法）：先试很多可能路线，再把更有希望的路线重点探索</li>
</ul>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701170637034.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="教模型推理过程-imitation-learning微调后训练" class="heading-element"><span>教模型推理过程 （Imitation Learning）【微调，后训练】</span>
 <a href="#%e6%95%99%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b%e6%8e%a8%e7%90%86%e8%bf%87%e7%a8%8b-imitation-learning%e5%be%ae%e8%b0%83%e5%90%8e%e8%ae%ad%e7%bb%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701171046057.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<p>其中的reasoning process可以通过模型本身要求其使用CoT来产生训练材料。</p>
<p>Verifier可以是现成的语言模型。</p>
<p>如果要确认reasoning process是正确的，可以使用前面的process verifier来逐步确认正确性或用强化学习来给出正确几率最高的答案。</p>
<p>但是没必要每一步都要正确，因为模型需要有找自己问题的能力（反思）</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701171309705.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<ul>
<li>
<p>Stream of search（SoS）</p>
<p>广度遍历树，故意走错误路线，强化思索中知错能改的功能</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701172036214.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
</ul>
